name: SCAR-20 | 开拓者
descriptionEn: The SCAR-20 is a semi-automatic sniper rifle that trades a high rate of fire and powerful long-distance damage for sluggish movement speed and big price tag. It has been custom painted with a monochrome black design and silver inlays. FOR USE BY AUTHORIZED CT AGENTS ONLY
descriptionZh: SCAR-20 是一把以迟缓的移动速度和高昂的价格为代价，换取高射速及强大的远距离杀伤力的半自动狙击步枪。 这款定制涂装采用了单黑色设计及银色镶嵌。 仅供授权的CT特工使用
